title: Cobblemon Sweet Honey
description: Replaces the Honey Bottle texture with one resembling Sweet Honey from the pokemon games - Intended for use with Cobblemon.
body:
A tiny resource pack that simply changes the Honey Bottle texture to one resembling Sweet Honey - Referenced and recreated from the beta texture seen in the Cobblemon Dev Logs.

All credit to the texture go to the Cobblemon Team, I simply recreated it using the colour palette of the vanilla Honey Bottle.
